entries.title: Leisure Educator
entries.description: Traveled around within Stockholm City and was part of the substitute pool, with assignments at schools for both short- and long-term periods. Supported educational activities through classroom assistance, recess supervision, and participation in after-school programs, while contributing to daily operations where needed. Demonstrated strong adaptability to new environments, routines and work teams.

entries.title: Leisure Educator/Jack of all traits
entries.description: Supported daily school operations, assisted with IT troubleshooting, managed communication with students, parents, and staff, and handled logistics and maintenance. Developed strong reliability, adaptability, and communication skills.

entries.title: QA Intern
entries.description: Performed functional and regression testing on Payday 3, wrote detailed bug reports in Jira, retested fixes, and conducted crossplay and backend validation. Followed structured test plans alongside exploratory testing and used community feedback to guide priorities. Strengthened organization, communication, and independent task management in a live AAA environment.

entries.title: Quality Assurance Game Tester
entries.description: Learned QA fundamentals including test design and defect management, gained hands-on experience in console, mobile, and web testing, and applied advanced techniques like load, regression, and usability testing. Developed knowledge in release management and collaboration, and completed a full-cycle QA project from planning to execution.

entries.title: Museum Assistant
entries.description: Managed customer interactions and daily shop operations, conducted surveys, handled opening and closing routines, and maintained exhibit areas with strong attention to detail.

entries.title: Crew Member
entries.description: Managed ticketing and VIP check-in, and delivered customer-focused service. Adapted quickly to changing needs while collaborating across teams to ensure smooth event execution.

entries.title: Crew Member
entries.description: Supported event setup/teardown and front-of-house operations, managed ticketing and VIP check-in, and delivered customer-focused service. Adapted quickly to changing needs while collaborating across teams to ensure smooth event execution.

entries.title: Leisure Educator
entries.description: Collaborated with colleagues to support preschool classes and activities, adapting to changing needs with professionalism and empathy. Demonstrated reliability, flexibility, and a commitment to a positive, respectful school environment.

entries.title: Market Researcher
entries.description: Price survey and inventory check-up at different grocery stores like ICA, Willy, COOP, etc.
